scripts.postinstall: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.ci:check: npm run install:all && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.audit: npm --prefix backend audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=high
